{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240036377352D79A5C6B1F8C2410"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607326053654840089","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书其实写的非常不好，所以我决定后期决定穿插灵气复苏世纪，这本书的主角叫江辞，女主还未出现，但还是以诸天人物看抖音为主。
另外多说一句“这个世界不是只有主角一个人有系统哦”女主不会重点描写，只是告诉你们一下。感情戏我没写是直接跳到几年后写江辞结婚的。
这本书的元素特别杂“灵气复苏，诸天万界观影系统，诸天万界里面的人物看主角江辞里面的抖音内容等等”
后期虽然有灵气复苏的部分但不会影响主线。毕竟书名叫《我的抖音通万界之诸天人物看抖音》，核心依旧是诸天人物通过水幕看抖音，不会乱改核心设定，前面写得不好的地方后面会慢慢调整，尽量让故事更顺畅。","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":23,"text":"灵气复苏","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%B5%E6%B0%94%E5%A4%8D%E8%8B%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742837971F8C2410%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607326053654840089%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227591503766667414552%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%B5%E6%B0%94%E5%A4%8D%E8%8B%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771224116,"group_id":"7591503766667414552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不入流作者的幻想之旅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6a7aIdMb7hrICY/fBJPQ20tNREFHnpCED5V2iPanHRD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f6a1dfc340dc4e5491cb2f043a305044~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879191&x-signature=PiBCzfWT0Lwg%2FdmMm4jTFl%2BseJs%3D","user_id":"3693954563324125","user_name":"迷城寒烟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3693954563324125","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663453320,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title"
